---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a reproducibility, extraction, retrieval, or evaluation improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What materials-AI or evidence-linking problem should this solve?

## Proposed Scope

What should be added or changed?

## Evidence / Example

If possible, provide a public source, fixture, or synthetic example.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tests or demo added
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No private data or credentials included
